chunks.text: IN TH٤ ORDER SHEET 0F Date CPNo.D-573 0f AT SUKKUR Order 2023 with signature of Judge For c٥50. 05.10 present for the Petitioner M٢،: Hussain Maitlo, advocate for M٢ Imdad Respondents University A4G ++w#n#w###i#wwww٦ Learned Counsel for the Respondents/ University submits that as per schedule Rs 3OOOOO/- are being paid to the petitioner and out of Rs.70,00,00O/- only Rs.23,00,000/ are outstanding which would be paid him accordingly equal installment Rs.3OO, 0OO/- per month None present for the Petitioner; however it appears that this petition has served its purpose and accordingly disposed 0f. However default or non-payment of said amount to the petitioner would expose violator to the contempt proceedings HIGH COURT SINDH BENCH hgarlng maln,2023 None Niaz Shahrayar Awan,
